reviews.comment:
Impecable. Buen lugar para parar allí.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable. Good place to stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLS11YjRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Excelente alto en el camino

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. A great stop along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLTZQOEtnEAE

reviews.comment:
Poco personal por la cantidad de gente que pasa por un café, un descanso, etcétera. Los pibes que atienden son lo mejor pero deberían haber más personal. Es mentalmente insoportable el ritmo de gente que pasa y atienden. Espero que mejoren eso.

(Translated by Google)
There's not enough staff for the number of people coming in for coffee, a break, and so on. The young people who work there are great, but they really need more staff. The pace of people coming in and being served is mentally exhausting. I hope they improve that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLTdYazFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente como todo en el ACA. Parada obligada camino a la costa

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as always at the ACA. A must-stop on the way to the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdTc3aEZREAE

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para descansar, cargar combustible, comprar algo, alguna golosina, etc, ir al baño, bastante limpios, le queda bien a quien viaja desde Mar del Plata a Buenos Aires, viceversa no

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to rest, refuel, buy something (a snack, etc.), use the restroom (it's quite clean), and it's convenient for those traveling from Mar del Plata to Buenos Aires, but not vice versa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMl8yOFF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar,muy buena atención en la zona para comer,no tanto en la gente que limpia los baños, que son maleducadas algunas de ellas

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop, very good service in the dining area, not so much from the people who clean the bathrooms, some of whom are rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNjdpN0N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para hacer un stop viajando por la  ruta, recomendable. Por favor a cuidarlo entre todos🙏 .

(Translated by Google)
A lovely place to stop while traveling along the road, highly recommended. Please let's all take care of it 🙏.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcS1YZlZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy cómodo para detenerse en la ruta camino a la costa, cuenta con una amplia arboleda y mesas para sentarse y disfrutar de unos sandwiiches

(Translated by Google)
Very convenient for stopping on the way to the coast, it has a large grove of trees and tables to sit and enjoy some sandwiches.
